table_description: The accounts table stores information about customer accounts, including account details and contact information. It uniquely identifies records using a combination of account_id, customer_id, and sscrm_customer_id.

columns.name: account_id
columns.description: Uniquely identifies records in the table along with customer_id and sscrm_customer_id, likely used to distinguish between different accounts.

columns.name: account_name
columns.description: Stores the name of the account, which can be used for identification and analysis purposes.

columns.name: account_number
columns.description: Holds the account number, which may be used for reference and tracking purposes.

columns.name: customer_id
columns.description: Uniquely identifies records in the table along with account_id and sscrm_customer_id, likely referencing a customer entity.

columns.name: customer_number
columns.description: Stores a customer number, which could be used to reference or track customer information.

columns.name: sscrm_customer_id
columns.description: Uniquely identifies records in the table along with account_id and customer_id, possibly referencing a customer in an external system.

columns.name: branch
columns.description: Holds the branch information associated with the account, which can be used for geographical analysis and filtering.

columns.name: portfolio_owner
columns.description: Stores the name or identifier of the portfolio owner, which can be used to track ownership and responsibility.

columns.name: primary_contact_name
columns.description: Stores the name of the primary contact for the account, which can be used for communication and relationship management purposes.

columns.name: primary_contact_email1
columns.description: Holds the email address of the primary contact, which can be used for communication and outreach efforts.

columns.name: primary_contact_phone1
columns.description: Stores the phone number of the primary contact, which can be used for direct communication and follow-up activities.
